g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the format detector in detail with Docling')
sendPrompt('How does Docling handle PDF with mixed content - tables, images, prose?')
sendPrompt('How does Docling parse DOCX with embedded images?')
sendPrompt('How does openpyxl extract merged cells and multi-row headers?')
sendPrompt('How does Tesseract OCR handle scanned PDF pages and embedded images?')
sendPrompt('How does Docling classify charts vs diagrams vs screenshots?')
sendPrompt('Explain the prose splitter with Docling chunking strategy')
sendPrompt('How does Argos Translate handle German and French requirements?')
sendPrompt('Explain the header map with RapidFuzz and spaCy')
